reviews.author: Aparna Appu
reviews.review_body: "We are glad to choose  EMPS for our child! The teachers are warm, nurturing, and truly invested in each child's growth. The curriculum is engaging, and our child has learned so much.The facilities are clean, safe, and well-organized. Communication with parents is excellent, and we always feel informed. Our child is happy, confident, and excited to go to school each day. We highly recommend to any family looking for a wonderful preschool experience!"

reviews.author: Aakriti Srivastava
reviews.review_body: EMPS is one of the best preschools in our area..I highly recommend this school to any parents seeking a nurturing and great learning environment for their child..Teachers are very caring and attentive, fostering a warm atmosphere where children feel safe to explore and learn..My daughter is always excited to go to school..I am totally impressed by their engaging activities and creative learning approach..Thank you to entire EMPS team..I am happy that we chose Enriching Minds..

reviews.author: priyanka a
reviews.review_body:
I m fully satisfied with all the support they provide and the standards they maintain in every aspect. The environment itself feels comfortable. My daughter goes to school happily everyday in fact she is excited
too

reviews.author: srikanth srinivasan
reviews.review_body: Outstanding  and unique in every way.

reviews.author: LalluTalks
reviews.review_body: Best school to join for preschoolers.All the teachers are well trained and they take time to understand the child and make them comfortable to the class room.The regular communication from the school keeps us informed about child progress and the activities that they involved with in.Thanks to all the Emps team for taking good care of our champ.

reviews.author: neetha reddy
reviews.review_body: Best school and great future ahead for every child…All the best to the team

reviews.author: Vinod Tammana
reviews.review_body: Best place for your kids to enrich their minds at seed level.

reviews.author: Peddireddy Srikanthreddy
reviews.review_body: Hii such a nice school I ever seen my both kids are into this school  we parents never bothered about my kids.  Very safe and care.  Taken by staf thank to organization.
